---
title: "Weinan Hu"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/avatar.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
---

I am a researcher in **quantitative marketing**. I am preparing to apply for a PhD in 2027.

## Interests

- Structural models of consumer choice and search
- Large Language Models and Recommender systems nudging effect.
- Empirical analysis of online platforms (advertising, misinformation)

## Currently

- Predoc at INSEAD marketing area

See [Research](research/index.qmd) for more.
